sentences.translation: Merjem je primila poruku od prijateljice.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam received a message from her friend.

sentences.translation: Poruka je bila pozivnica za sastanak.
sentences.translationEn: The message was an invitation to meet.

sentences.translation: Brzo je odgovorila i rekla: Biću tamo.
sentences.translationEn: She replied quickly and said: I will be there.

sentences.arabic: أَضَافَتْ رَمْزَ الِابْتِسَامَةِ فِي نِهَايَةِ الرَّسَالَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dodala je emoji osmjeha na kraju poruke.
sentences.translationEn: She added a smiley emoji at the end of the message.
